description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Ruby image and runs a before_script to display the Ruby version, install bundler without documentation, and install project dependencies with bundle install using all CPU cores. Define a single job named rspec (which runs in the default test stage) that executes a series of rake tasks. The job runs `bundle exec rake lint || /bin/true` to lint the code while ignoring failures, then `bundle exec rake syntax`, `bundle exec rake validate`, and finally `bundle exec rake spec` to run the test suite. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured.
